description: Case style: Silver toned squarish case with a fixed bezel Dial style: Blue dial, silver hands Strap style: Silvery strap with fold over clasp, crystal studded Features: Logo at the 12-hour mark, screw to reset time, solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters & ndash wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Warranty: 2 years from the date of purchase
